'''Atterol''' was a celestial body in the [[Atterol system/Legends|Atterol system]]. It was near Atterol that the [[Battle of Atterol]] took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="XWvTF" />

{{Loc-stub}}

==Appearances==
